name: nomadnexus
description: Discord, but beautiful. An elegant theme by a-nomad studio for BetterDiscord & Vencord.
author: Colin Chang

scripts.build: sass src:dist --load-path=src --style=compressed --no-source-map && postcss dist/*.css -d dist/ -u autoprefixer --no-map && sass templates:dist --load-path=src --style=expanded --no-source-map
